basic_details.job_title: Prakasam District Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 23 Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and General Posts
basic_details.post_name: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and General
basic_details.short_information: Prakasam District (Prakasam District) Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and General Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 23 vacancies have been announced through the Prakasam District Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and General Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Person with benchmark disability: 10 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years in addition to service rendered.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in specialty for CASS, MBBS for CAS General, Registered in A.P. Medical Council
qualification.details: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists: Must have passed PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council. Civil Assistant Surgeon General: Must have passed MBBS Degree. Registered in A.P. Medical Council.

selection_process: Merit List Selection based on marks in qualifying degree Weightage for experience Document Verification

all_official_links.label: Download Prakasam District Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by Prakasam District?
faq.answer: Prakasam District has announced a total of 23 vacancies for the posts of Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and General.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for the Prakasam District recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the walk-in date is 17-06-2026. There is no separate last date for application submission.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists, a PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the specialty is required. For Civil Assistant Surgeon General, an MBBS Degree is necessary. Registration with the A.P. Medical Council is mandatory for both.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Civil Assistant Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 61,960/- per month for Civil Assistant Surgeon General to Rs. 1,10,000/- per month for Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Prakasam District recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process includes the creation of a Merit List, selection based on marks in the qualifying degree, weightage for experience, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Ongole, Prakasam District, Andhra Pradesh. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.
